body.visualDesc: Extreme close-up of ONE single smooth pale-cream egg lying on its side in dark garden soil among tiny green carrot tops. CRITICAL: exactly ONE egg in the entire image, perfectly smooth and completely uncracked - no second egg anywhere, no cracks, no damage. Pip's round cream-white face (straw hat just visible) peeks up from the bottom edge of the frame, eyes enormous with wonder, beak parted in a gasp. Warm early-morning light, dew on the leaves, soft-blurred empty soil in the background.
